mapper.select: SELECT * FROM SCM_RJ_SIMP.ALERT_ACCESS_LIST WHERE ID = #{id} AND IS_DELETE = 0
SELECT * FROM SCM_RJ_SIMP.ALERT_ACCESS_LIST WHERE ID = #{id} AND IS_DELETE = 0 AND STATUS = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM SCM_RJ_SIMP.ALERT_RULE WHERE IS_DELETE = 0 AND (WHITELIST_ID = #{id} OR BLACKLIST_ID = #{id})
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SCM_RJ_SIMP.ALERT_ACCESS_LIST (NAME, TYPE, STATUS, REMARK, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_TIME, IS_DELETE) VALUES (#{name}, #{type}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE SCM_RJ_SIMP.ALERT_ACCESS_LIST SET NAME = #{name}, TYPE = #{type}, STATUS = #{status}, REMARK = #{remark}, UPDATE_TIME = #{updateTime} WHERE ID = #{id}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO SCM_RJ_SIMP.ALERT_ACCESS_LIST_USER (LIST_ID, USER_NAME, USER_ACCOUNT) VALUES
(#{listId}, #{u.userName}, #{u.userAccount})
